body:
https://github.com/Jhon-Crow/godot-topdown-MVP/pull/1859#issuecomment-4271561699 - in this comment we have unknown public pricing estimate, yet in models.dev GPT-5.4 model clearly present. That needs to be fixed.

Also we have in markdown of comment:

```
Token usage: 42,742 input, 4,784 output, 885,376 cache read
```

which is clearly a duplicate of:

```
Total: (42.7K + 885.4K cached) input tokens, 4.8K output tokens
```

So only `Total: (42.7K + 885.4K cached) input tokens, 4.8K output tokens` is enough, and `Token usage: 42,742 input, 4,784 output, 885,376 cache read` should be removed.

We should also use all best practices on token/context/sessions/sub-sessions/sub-agents display we have for `--tool claude` and `--tool agent`, even better to unify the logic as much as possible, and make display similar.

Double check if Codex provide price calculation in the output, of if we can somehow make the output of Codex more verbose and useful, with more additional data to work with.

Double check we collect each and every piece of data about tokens usage, so we can calculate the price estimate as close to reality, we should use not only totals, but also calculate from each message and tool call tokens usage if available, double check logs.

Full log: https://gist.githubusercontent.com/konard/90ed26638390deed8cd6844474c909b9/raw/5f8faff1e7ee296cdf95548f734f889d97825bb6/solution-draft-log-pr-1776463285180.txt

We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration.

If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
title: `--tool codex` does not display pricing
